summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Gift Card Generator application. All backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/generate/{brand_id} generates valid codes for all brands
Homepage loads with hero section and brand grid
All 6 brand cards display with correct names and icons
Generate button creates codes and changes to 'Regenerate'
Copy button copies codes to clipboard with success toast
Stats counter increments after each generation
Code display uses monospace font (JetBrains Mono)
Hover effects work on brand cards
All brand code formats match expected patterns
Error handling works for invalid brand requests
